title: Evaluating the Utility of Personal Health Records in Personalized Health AI
summary:
arXiv:2605.18937v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Patient-managed Personal Health Records (PHRs) promises to empower patients to better understand their health; but information in the record is complex, potentially hindering insights. In this study, we assess the potential of large language models (LLMs, Gemini 3.0 Flash) to provide helpful answers to user health queries, when provided clinical data from PHRs as context.
